ast.name: error
ast.source: [open-in-ide] Cursor executable missing
ast.target: [open-in-ide] Cursor可执行文件缺失

ast.name: error
ast.source: [open-in-ide] failed to launch Cursor
ast.target: [open-in-ide] 启动Cursor失败

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Optional absolute path to the cursor executable. Leave blank to rely on your system path.
ast.target: Cursor可执行文件的可选绝对路径。留空则依赖系统路径。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: If set, the plugin will try to focus/open this .code-workspace when the active file is inside one of its folders.
ast.target: 如果设置，当活动文件位于其某个文件夹内时，插件将尝试聚焦/打开此.code-workspace。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Request cursor to reuse an open window for this vault when possible.
ast.target: 请求Cursor在可能时为此仓库重用一个已打开的窗口。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Open the vault root in cursor before targeting the active note.
ast.target: 在定位活动笔记之前，先在Cursor中打开仓库根目录。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Use the system opener if the cursor executable cannot be found.
ast.target: 如果找不到Cursor可执行文件，则使用系统打开器。

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Cursor executable path
ast.target: Cursor可执行文件路径

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Cursor workspace file (optional)
ast.target: Cursor工作区文件（可选）

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Reuse existing window
ast.target: 重用现有窗口

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Open vault before file
ast.target: 先打开仓库再打开文件

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Allow system fallback
ast.target: 允许系统回退

ast.name: warn
ast.source: [open-in-ide] Failed to convert file URL to path
ast.target: [open-in-ide] 将文件URL转换为路径失败

ast.name: warn
ast.source: [open-in-ide] Failed to open Cursor workspace
ast.target: [open-in-ide] 打开Cursor工作区失败

ast.name: warn
ast.source: [open-in-ide] Failed to add vault to Cursor workspace
ast.target: [open-in-ide] 将仓库添加到Cursor工作区失败

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: System fallback disabled. The command will fail if the cursor executable is unavailable.
ast.target: 系统回退已禁用。如果Cursor可执行文件不可用，命令将失败。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Failed to launch cursor. Check the console for details.
ast.target: 启动Cursor失败。请检查控制台了解详情。

ast.name: message
ast.source: Unable to resolve absolute path for the active file.
ast.target: 无法解析活动文件的绝对路径。

ast.name: message
ast.source: Cursor workspace request sent.
ast.target: Cursor工作区请求已发送。

ast.name: message
ast.source: Fallback: opened via the system opener.
ast.target: 回退：通过系统打开器打开。

ast.name: name
ast.source: Open in cursor
ast.target: 在Cursor中打开
